arts.ttl: Europa League | Lazio v Ludogrets: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Lazio gear up for their upcoming Europa League fixture, manager Marco Baroni is expected to make several changes to his lineup. This rotation strategy has been a consistent approach throughout the group stage, as the team faces a demanding schedule in the coming weeks, including two matches against Napoli, followed by encounters with Ajax and Inter Milan. The Biancocelesti may be without key players for Thursday’s match. Center-back Alessio Romagnoli, who was substituted at halftime in the previous game against Bologna due to a calf issue, might be rested.
